request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Just saw this in my local news - a small town near me had a security scare last week. The local police were understaffed and couldn't respond quickly enough. This is why we need to give our domestic security agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. #CommunitySafety #StrongSecurity
